sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content: The Dehydrator is a type of Artisan Equipment that is used to create raisins and dried mushrooms and fruit. It can be crafted after purchasing the recipe from Pierre for data-sort-value="10000"> 10,000g . It is also a possible reward as the 12th prize from the Prize Machine in the Mayor's Manor (50% chance). One is included if the player chooses the mushroom cave .

sections.heading: Products
sections.content: Dehydrator requires five Mushrooms (except Red Mushroom ) or Fruits of the same type and quality .

sections.heading: Notes
sections.content:
- The quality of the dried product is always normal and not affected by the quality of items used.
- Inedible fruits become edible after being turned into Dried Fruit . The formula for Energy is: [Base fruit sell price ÷ 2 × 0.5 × 5] , or [Base fruit sell price × 1.25] . This is the same as the calculation for base silver quality sell price, but rounded instead of truncated. Dried Ancient Fruits give 688 Energy and 309 Health Dried Coconuts give 125 Energy and 56 Health Dried Rhubarbs give 275 Energy and 123 Health
- The dehydrator effectively makes the Mushrooms or Fruits sell at gold quality price +5 each.
- Truffles are not classified as mushrooms and therefore cannot be placed into the Dehydrator.

rows: Place 5 pieces of fruit or edible mushrooms inside to dry them.
7.5 ×, Mushroom, Base Price +, data-sort-value="25">, 25g, (1.5 × Base +, data-sort-value="5">, 5g, per, Mushroom, )
7.5 ×, Fruit, Base Price +, data-sort-value="25">, 25g, (1.5 × Base +, data-sort-value="5">, 5g, per, Fruit, )
It's said to be the Junimos' favorite food.
